message:
chore(deps): bump major + minor versions across runtime and dev tree

Pulled forward the long tail of outdated direct deps that had
accumulated between cargo update passes. All of these had landed
new majors that were sitting unmerged.

Production:
- clap_complete  4.5  → 4.6
- colored        2.1  → 3.0    (major; same API surface for our uses)
- console        0.15 → 0.16
- indicatif      0.17 → 0.18
- toml           0.8  → 1.1    (major; we only use top-level
                                 from_str/to_string)
- tantivy        0.22 → 0.26   (see src/search.rs note)
- wide           0.7  → 1.3    (major; our SIMD dot products use
                                 the stable API only)
- tokenizers     0.21 → 0.23
- safetensors    0.5  → 0.7    (see src/model2vec_embedder.rs note)
- dirs           5.0  → 6.0
- rand           0.8  → 0.10   (see src/benchmark/metrics.rs note)
- itertools      0.13 → 0.14

Dev:
- criterion      0.5  → 0.8    (see benches/search_perf.rs note)
- which          7.0  → 8.0
- nix            0.30 → 0.31

Source-side fallout from those bumps:

src/search.rs (tantivy 0.26)
- TopDocs::with_limit(limit) no longer scores by default; the new
  builder is `with_limit(limit).order_by_score()`. Without this,
  top-N results would degrade to insertion order and the relevance
  ranking we rely on for the `xf` search UI would be silently
  wrong. Pure API ergonomics change in upstream — same semantics
  once the explicit method is called.

src/benchmark/metrics.rs (rand 0.10)
- 0.10 split the `Rng` trait into core `Rng` + `RngExt`, and
  renamed `gen_range` to `random_range` to align with the new
  `random*` family on `Rng`. Update both call sites in
  `bootstrap_ci` and `bootstrap_mean_diff`.

benches/search_perf.rs (criterion 0.8)
- Criterion 0.8 stopped re-exporting `black_box` from `criterion`;
  the canonical home is now `std::hint::black_box` (which has been
  stable since 1.66). Drop `black_box` from the criterion import
  list and add `use std::hint::black_box;`.

src/model2vec_embedder.rs (safetensors 0.7)
- `SafeTensors::names()` now returns `Vec<&'a str>` directly
  instead of `Vec<&'a String>`, so `.cloned()` no longer compiles
  (`&str` clones to `&str`, not `String`). Replace with
  `.map(String::from)` to allocate owned `String`s as before.

Cargo.lock regenerated; net is -146 lines (several major bumps
collapsed transitive trees).

Out of scope (deferred to follow-up upgrades because they touch
downstream code more invasively):
- rusqlite     0.32 → 0.39 (multiple breaking ?-conversion changes)
- rustyline    12   → 18   (event-loop and helper trait rewrites)
- zip          2    → 8    (Read/Write trait reshuffle)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
